title: entity count
description: count all entities currently loaded throughout your world.
body:
an entity counter for Minecraft 1.13-1.20 to list all currently loaded (vanilla) entities throughout your world (including all dimensions if the server allows it) in a scoreboard.
```
/function count:count
```

![preview of command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2cD1v1yp/images/f5271f73dfd1a05a09d178b922d093a4cddb5538.png)

additionally, in versions `2022.1230` and above an "entity logging" feature exists which can help to find areas with large amount of mobs. unlike the counter, this has support for modded entities.
```
/function count:log
```

![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/46572320/210099315-4d1e0a83-9b57-491d-9f11-363d687c6f2e.png)
